metadata.description: Hierarchical toolbox registry for Ajora builder agent. Includes domains, actions, and adapters for core integrations.

snippet.description: Short preview of the email body

append_result.description: Result of appending data to a spreadsheet

updatedRows.description: Number of rows that were updated

row_object.description: Represents a spreadsheet row that triggered the automation

row.description: Key-value pairs of column name to cell value

sheetName.description: Name of the sheet tab the row belongs to

send_result.description: Result of sending an email message

messageId.description: Unique ID of the sent message

label_result.description: Result of applying labels to an email message

messageId.description: ID of the message that was labelled

record_object.description: Represents a record or page created in a structured database

recordId.description: Unique ID of the created record

properties.description: Key-value map of the record's database properties

file_object.description: Represents a file that triggered the automation

webViewLink.description: URL to open the file in a browser

domains.name: Email
domains.description: Interact with email accounts to send, receive, or monitor messages.
examples: When a new email arrives in my inbox
Send an email to a contact
Search my emails for invoices

domains.name: Spreadsheet
domains.description: Work with tabular data stored in online spreadsheets like Google Sheets or Excel.
examples: Add a row to my Google Sheet
Update a value in Excel
Log new data into a sheet
When a new row is added to my spreadsheet

domains.name: Database
domains.description: Create and manage structured records in database and knowledge base tools (e.g. Notion, Airtable).
examples: Add a new page to my Notion database
Create a record in Airtable
Log an entry to my Notion wiki

domains.name: File Storage
domains.description: Monitor and manage files and folders in cloud file storage services (e.g. Google Drive, Dropbox).
examples: When a new file is uploaded to my Google Drive folder
Monitor a folder for new documents
Trigger when a file is added to Dropbox

actions.name: Email Trigger
actions.description: Trigger an automation when a new email is received or matches specific filters.
examples: When I get a new email
Check my inbox every 15 minutes
Monitor my Gmail for new messages

actions.name: Send Email
actions.description: Send an email message to one or more recipients.
examples: Send an email to my manager
Notify someone by email
Send a confirmation email

actions.name: Label Email
actions.description: Apply a label or tag to an existing email message.
examples: Label an email as processed
Tag the email with a category
Mark the message with a Gmail label

actions.name: Spreadsheet Trigger
actions.description: Trigger an automation when a new row is added or updated in a spreadsheet.
examples: When a new row is added to my sheet
Monitor Google Sheets for new entries
Trigger when the spreadsheet is updated

actions.name: Spreadsheet Append
actions.description: Append a new row or record to an existing spreadsheet.
examples: Add a new row to my sheet
Append data to Google Sheets
Save an email summary into a spreadsheet

actions.name: Create Record
actions.description: Create a new record or page in a structured database.
examples: Add a new entry to my Notion database
Create a record in Airtable
Log an item to my Notion table

actions.name: File Storage Trigger
actions.description: Trigger an automation when a file is created or modified in a cloud storage folder.
examples: When a new file is added to my Google Drive folder
Monitor a folder for new uploads
Trigger when a document appears in Drive

adapters.name: Gmail Trigger
adapters.description: Monitors a Gmail inbox for new messages using OAuth2 authentication. Polls the inbox at specified intervals and triggers the automation when new emails arrive or match filter criteria. Supports monitoring specific folders and applying search filters.

pollTimes.description: Defines how often the inbox is checked for new messages.

filters.description: Optional search filters to narrow which emails trigger the automation.

examples: When a new Gmail email arrives
Monitor my Gmail inbox
Trigger flow when Gmail gets a message with attachment

adapters.name: Send Email via Gmail
adapters.description: Sends an email message via a Gmail account using OAuth2 authentication. Supports plain text and HTML email bodies, including template expressions that reference data from prior steps.

sendTo.description: Recipient email address(es). Separate multiple addresses with commas.

message.description: Body of the email. Supports template expressions referencing prior step output (e.g. {{$json.from}}).

examples: Send an email via Gmail
Notify someone by Gmail
Send a confirmation email from my Gmail account

adapters.name: Add Label to Gmail Message
adapters.description: Applies one or more labels to an existing Gmail message using OAuth2 authentication. The message ID must be available from a prior step (e.g. a Gmail trigger or search).

messageId.description: ID of the Gmail message to label. Typically referenced from a prior trigger or search step.

labelIds.description: One or more Gmail label IDs to apply to the message.

examples: Label the email as processed
Tag the Gmail message
Mark the email with a category label

adapters.name: Google Sheets Trigger
adapters.description: Monitors a Google Sheets spreadsheet for new or updated rows using OAuth2 authentication. Polls at specified intervals and triggers the automation when the selected event occurs.

pollTimes.description: How often to check the sheet for changes.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Sheets document to monitor.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet tab to watch.

event.description: The type of change that triggers the automation.

examples: When a new row is added to Google Sheets
Monitor my Google Sheet for new entries
Trigger when the spreadsheet changes

adapters.name: Google Sheets Append
adapters.description: Appends new rows to a Google Sheets spreadsheet using OAuth2 authentication. Receives data and maps it to specified columns in the target sheet. Can either always append new rows or update existing rows based on matching criteria. Supports data type conversion and custom column mapping.

operation.description: Whether to always append or update matching rows.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Sheets document to append data to.

sheetName.description: The target sheet tab within the spreadsheet.

columns.description: Defines how input data fields map to spreadsheet columns.

convertFieldsToString.description: Whether to coerce all values to text before inserting.

examples: Add a new row to a Google Sheet
Save email snippet to Google Sheets
Append values into Sheet1

adapters.name: Create Notion Database Page
adapters.description: Creates a new page (row) in a Notion database using the Notion API. Accepts a database ID, a page title, and optional property values that map to the database's column schema.

databaseId.description: ID of the Notion database to create the page in.

title.description: Title of the new page/row in the database.

propertiesUi.description: Key-value pairs mapping database property names to values (e.g. Sender, Snippet URL). Property keys must match the database schema.

examples: Create a new page in my Notion database
Add an entry to Notion
Log data to a Notion table

adapters.name: Google Drive Trigger
adapters.description: Monitors a Google Drive folder for new or modified files using OAuth2 authentication. Polls at specified intervals and triggers when the selected file event occurs.

pollTimes.description: How often to check the folder for new files.

triggerOn.description: Whether to monitor a specific folder or any folder in Drive.

folderToWatch.description: Google Drive folder ID to monitor. Required when triggerOn is 'specificFolder'.

event.description: The type of file event that triggers the automation.

examples: When a new file is added to my Google Drive folder
Monitor a Drive folder for uploads
Trigger when a document appears in Drive
